# solution.py
"""
QuestHub - Integrated Quest Management, Skill Planning, and Real-Time Collaboration
for Role-Playing Game Players.

A comprehensive system that allows players to manage quests, plan character skills,
and collaborate with other players in real-time.
"""

import json
import hashlib
import hmac
import time
import uuid
import sqlite3
import threading
import base64
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional, Dict, List, Any
from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
from enum import Enum
from collections import defaultdict


# =============================================================================
# database.py - Database Layer
# =============================================================================

class Database:
    """SQLite-based database with support for concurrent access and real-time updates."""

    def __init__(self, db_path: str = ":memory:"):
        self.db_path = db_path
        self._local = threading.local()
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._init_schema()

    @property
    def connection(self) -> sqlite3.Connection:
        if not hasattr(self._local, "conn") or self._local.conn is None:
            self._local.conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path, check_same_thread=False)
            self._local.conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
            self._local.conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
            self._local.conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON")
        return self._local.conn

    def _init_schema(self):
        conn = self.connection
        conn.executescript("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
                display_name TEXT,
                avatar_url TEXT,
                level INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                experience INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                last_login TEXT
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quests (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                title TEXT NOT NULL,
                description TEXT,
                quest_type TEXT DEFAULT 'main',
                status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
                priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                difficulty TEXT DEFAULT 'normal',
                experience_reward INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                creator_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                assigned_to TEXT,
                parent_quest_id TEXT,
                deadline TEXT,
                completed_at TEXT,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (creator_id) REFERENCES users(id),
                FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES users(id),
                FOREIGN KEY (parent_quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id)
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quest_objectives (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                quest_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                description TEXT NOT NULL,
                is_completed INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_plans (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                name TEXT NOT NULL,
                description TEXT,
                character_class TEXT,
                target_level INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skills (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                plan_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                name TEXT NOT NULL,
                description TEXT,
                category TEXT DEFAULT 'general',
                current_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                target_level INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                prerequisites TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
                order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (plan_id) REFERENCES skill_plans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collaboration_rooms (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                name TEXT NOT NULL,
                room_type TEXT DEFAULT 'quest',
                reference_id TEXT,
                creator_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                max_participants INTEGER DEFAULT 10,
                is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (creator_id) REFERENCES users(id)
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_participants (
                room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                role TEXT DEFAULT 'member',
                joined_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (room_id, user_id),
                FOREIGN KEY (room_id) REFERENCES collaboration_rooms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                content TEXT NOT NULL,
                message_type TEXT DEFAULT 'text',
                metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (room_id) REFERENCES collaboration_rooms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
            );

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sync_events (
                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                entity_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                action TEXT NOT NULL,
                data TEXT NOT NULL,
                user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL
            );

            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_creator ON quests(creator_id);
            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_status ON quests(status);
            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skills_plan ON skills(plan_id);
            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_room ON messages(room_id);
            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sync_events_entity ON sync_events(entity_type, entity_id);
            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sync_events_timestamp ON sync_events(timestamp);
        """)
        conn.commit()

    def execute(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> sqlite3.Cursor:
        with self._lock:
            cursor = self.connection.execute(query, params)
            self.connection.commit()
            return cursor

    def fetch_one(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> Optional[Dict]:
        cursor = self.execute(query, params)
        row = cursor.fetchone()
        return dict(row) if row else None

    def fetch_all(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> List[Dict]:
        cursor = self.execute(query, params)
        return [dict(row) for row in cursor.fetchall()]


# =============================================================================
# auth.py - Authentication System
# =============================================================================

class AuthError(Exception):
    pass


class AuthService:
    """JWT-based authentication service with password hashing."""

    SECRET_KEY = "questhub-secret-key-change-in-production"
    TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS = 24

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    @staticmethod
    def _hash_password(password: str) -> str:
        salt = uuid.uuid4().hex
        hashed = hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac("sha256", password.encode(), salt.encode(), 100000)
        return f"{salt}${hashed.hex()}"

    @staticmethod
    def _verify_password(password: str, stored_hash: str) -> bool:
        salt, hash_val = stored_hash.split("$")
        hashed = hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac("sha256", password.encode(), salt.encode(), 100000)
        return hmac.compare_digest(hashed.hex(), hash_val)

    def _generate_token(self, user_id: str) -> str:
        header = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "JWT"}).encode()).decode()
        payload_data = {
            "user_id": user_id,
            "exp": (datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=self.TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS)).isoformat(),
            "iat": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
        payload = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(payload_data).encode()).decode()
        signature = hmac.new(
            self.SECRET_KEY.encode(), f"{header}.{payload}".encode(), hashlib.sha256
        ).hexdigest() if hasattr(hmac, 'new') else hmac.HMAC(
            self.SECRET_KEY.encode(), f"{header}.{payload}".encode(), hashlib.sha256
        ).hexdigest()
        return f"{header}.{payload}.{signature}"

    def _verify_token(self, token: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        try:
            parts = token.split(".")
            if len(parts) != 3:
                return None
            header, payload, signature = parts
            expected_sig = hmac.HMAC(
                self.SECRET_KEY.encode(), f"{header}.{payload}".encode(), hashlib.sha256
            ).hexdigest()
            if not hmac.compare_digest(signature, expected_sig):
                return None
            payload_data = json.loads(base64.urlsafe_b64decode(payload + "=="))
            exp = datetime.fromisoformat(payload_data["exp"])
            if datetime.utcnow() > exp:
                return None
            return payload_data
        except Exception:
            return None

    def register(self, username: str, email: str, password: str, display_name: str = None) -> Dict:
        if len(password) < 6:
            raise AuthError("Password must be at least 6 characters")
        existing = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ? OR email = ?", (username, email))
        if existing:
            raise AuthError("Username or email already exists")
        user_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, password_hash, display_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (user_id, username, email, self._hash_password(password), display_name or username, now, now),
        )
        token = self._generate_token(user_id)
        return {"user_id": user_id, "username": username, "token": token}

    def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> Dict:
        user = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT id, username, password_hash FROM users WHERE username = ?", (username,))
        if not user or not self._verify_password(password, user["password_hash"]):
            raise AuthError("Invalid credentials")
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute("UPDATE users SET last_login = ? WHERE id = ?", (now, user["id"]))
        token = self._generate_token(user["id"])
        return {"user_id": user["id"], "username": user["username"], "token": token}

    def authenticate(self, token: str) -> Optional[str]:
        payload = self._verify_token(token)
        return payload["user_id"] if payload else None

    def get_user_profile(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        return self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT id, username, email, display_name, avatar_url, level, experience, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?",
            (user_id,),
        )


# =============================================================================
# quest_service.py - Quest Management
# =============================================================================

class QuestStatus(Enum):
    ACTIVE = "active"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    ABANDONED = "abandoned"


class QuestType(Enum):
    MAIN = "main"
    SIDE = "side"
    DAILY = "daily"
    WEEKLY = "weekly"
    GROUP = "group"


class QuestService:
    """Service for managing quests, objectives, and quest lifecycle."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    def create_quest(self, creator_id: str, title: str, description: str = "",
                     quest_type: str = "main", difficulty: str = "normal",
                     experience_reward: int = 100, deadline: str = None,
                     parent_quest_id: str = None) -> Dict:
        quest_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO quests (id, title, description, quest_type, status, difficulty,
               experience_reward, creator_id, parent_quest_id, deadline, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (quest_id, title, description, quest_type, "active", difficulty,
             experience_reward, creator_id, parent_quest_id, deadline, now, now),
        )
        self._record_sync_event("quest", quest_id, "create", creator_id,
                                {"title": title, "quest_type": quest_type})
        return self.get_quest(quest_id)

    def get_quest(self, quest_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if quest:
            quest["objectives"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM quest_objectives WHERE quest_id = ? ORDER BY order_index", (quest_id,)
            )
        return quest

    def list_quests(self, user_id: str, status: str = None, quest_type: str = None) -> List[Dict]:
        query = "SELECT * FROM quests WHERE (creator_id = ? OR assigned_to = ?)"
        params = [user_id, user_id]
        if status:
            query += " AND status = ?"
            params.append(status)
        if quest_type:
            query += " AND quest_type = ?"
            params.append(quest_type)
        query += " ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at DESC"
        quests = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))
        for quest in quests:
            quest["objectives"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM quest_objectives WHERE quest_id = ? ORDER BY order_index", (quest["id"],)
            )
        return quests

    def update_quest(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str, **kwargs) -> Optional[Dict]:
        allowed_fields = {"title", "description", "status", "priority", "difficulty",
                          "assigned_to", "deadline", "experience_reward"}
        updates = {k: v for k, v in kwargs.items() if k in allowed_fields and v is not None}
        if not updates:
            return self.get_quest(quest_id)
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        updates["updated_at"] = now
        if updates.get("status") == "completed":
            updates["completed_at"] = now
        set_clause = ", ".join(f"{k} = ?" for k in updates)
        values = list(updates.values()) + [quest_id]
        self.db.execute(f"UPDATE quests SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?", tuple(values))
        if updates.get("status") == "completed":
            quest = self.get_quest(quest_id)
            if quest:
                self._award_experience(user_id, quest.get("experience_reward", 0))
        self._record_sync_event("quest", quest_id, "update", user_id, updates)
        return self.get_quest(quest_id)

    def delete_quest(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str) -> bool:
        quest = self.get_quest(quest_id)
        if not quest or quest["creator_id"] != user_id:
            return False
        self.db.execute("DELETE FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        self._record_sync_event("quest", quest_id, "delete", user_id, {})
        return True

    def add_objective(self, quest_id: str, description: str, order_index: int = 0) -> Dict:
        obj_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO quest_objectives (id, quest_id, description, order_index, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (obj_id, quest_id, description, order_index, now),
        )
        return {"id": obj_id, "quest_id": quest_id, "description": description,
                "is_completed": False, "order_index": order_index}

    def complete_objective(self, objective_id: str, user_id: str) -> bool:
        self.db.execute("UPDATE quest_objectives SET is_completed = 1 WHERE id = ?", (objective_id,))
        obj = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT quest_id FROM quest_objectives WHERE id = ?", (objective_id,))
        if obj:
            all_objs = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT is_completed FROM quest_objectives WHERE quest_id = ?", (obj["quest_id"],)
            )
            if all_objs and all(o["is_completed"] for o in all_objs):
                self.update_quest(obj["quest_id"], user_id, status="completed")
        return True

    def _award_experience(self, user_id: str, amount: int):
        user = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT experience, level FROM users WHERE id = ?", (user_id,))
        if user:
            new_exp = user["experience"] + amount
            new_level = 1 + new_exp // 1000
            self.db.execute(
                "UPDATE users SET experience = ?, level = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?",
                (new_exp, new_level, datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), user_id),
            )

    def _record_sync_event(self, entity_type: str, entity_id: str, action: str,
                           user_id: str, data: Dict):
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO sync_events (id, entity_type, entity_id, action, data, user_id, timestamp) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (str(uuid.uuid4()), entity_type, entity_id, action, json.dumps(data),
             user_id, datetime.utcnow().isoformat()),
        )


# =============================================================================
# skill_service.py - Skill Planning
# =============================================================================

class SkillCategory(Enum):
    COMBAT = "combat"
    MAGIC = "magic"
    CRAFTING = "crafting"
    SOCIAL = "social"
    EXPLORATION = "exploration"
    GENERAL = "general"


class SkillPlanService:
    """Service for managing character skill plans and progression."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    def create_plan(self, user_id: str, name: str, description: str = "",
                    character_class: str = None, target_level: int = 1) -> Dict:
        plan_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO skill_plans (id, user_id, name, description, character_class, target_level, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (plan_id, user_id, name, description, character_class, target_level, now, now),
        )
        return self.get_plan(plan_id)

    def get_plan(self, plan_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        plan = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skill_plans WHERE id = ?", (plan_id,))
        if plan:
            plan["skills"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM skills WHERE plan_id = ? ORDER BY order_index", (plan_id,)
            )
            for skill in plan["skills"]:
                skill["prerequisites"] = json.loads(skill.get("prerequisites", "[]"))
        return plan

    def list_plans(self, user_id: str, active_only: bool = True) -> List[Dict]:
        query = "SELECT * FROM skill_plans WHERE user_id = ?"
        params = [user_id]
        if active_only:
            query += " AND is_active = 1"
        query += " ORDER BY updated_at DESC"
        plans = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))
        for plan in plans:
            plan["skills"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM skills WHERE plan_id = ? ORDER BY order_index", (plan["id"],)
            )
            for skill in plan["skills"]:
                skill["prerequisites"] = json.loads(skill.get("prerequisites", "[]"))
        return plans

    def update_plan(self, plan_id: str, **kwargs) -> Optional[Dict]:
        allowed_fields = {"name", "description", "character_class", "target_level", "is_active"}
        updates = {k: v for k, v in kwargs.items() if k in allowed_fields and v is not None}
        if not updates:
            return self.get_plan(plan_id)
        updates["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        set_clause = ", ".join(f"{k} = ?" for k in updates)
        values = list(updates.values()) + [plan_id]
        self.db.execute(f"UPDATE skill_plans SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?", tuple(values))
        return self.get_plan(plan_id)

    def delete_plan(self, plan_id: str, user_id: str) -> bool:
        plan = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT user_id FROM skill_plans WHERE id = ?", (plan_id,))
        if not plan or plan["user_id"] != user_id:
            return False
        self.db.execute("DELETE FROM skill_plans WHERE id = ?", (plan_id,))
        return True

    def add_skill(self, plan_id: str, name: str, description: str = "",
                  category: str = "general", target_level: int = 1,
                  prerequisites: List[str] = None, order_index: int = 0) -> Dict:
        skill_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        prereqs = json.dumps(prerequisites or [])
        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO skills (id, plan_id, name, description, category, target_level, prerequisites, order_index, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (skill_id, plan_id, name, description, category, target_level, prereqs, order_index, now, now),
        )
        return {"id": skill_id, "plan_id": plan_id, "name": name, "description": description,
                "category": category, "current_level": 0, "target_level": target_level,
                "prerequisites": prerequisites or [], "order_index": order_index}

    def update_skill(self, skill_id: str, **kwargs) -> Optional[Dict]:
        allowed_fields = {"name", "description", "category", "current_level", "target_level", "order_index"}
        updates = {k: v for k, v in kwargs.items() if k in allowed_fields and v is not None}
        if "prerequisites" in kwargs:
            updates["prerequisites"] = json.dumps(kwargs["prerequisites"])
        if not updates:
            return self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        updates["updated_at"] = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        set_clause = ", ".join(f"{k} = ?" for k in updates)
        values = list(updates.values()) + [skill_id]
        self.db.execute(f"UPDATE skills SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?", tuple(values))
        skill = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        if skill:
            skill["prerequisites"] = json.loads(skill.get("prerequisites", "[]"))
        return skill

    def level_up_skill(self, skill_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        skill = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        if not skill:
            return None
        new_level = min(skill["current_level"] + 1, skill["target_level"])
        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skills SET current_level = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?",
            (new_level, datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), skill_id),
        )
        skill = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        if skill:
            skill["prerequisites"] = json.loads(skill.get("prerequisites", "[]"))
        return skill

    def get_skill_tree(self, plan_id: str) -> Dict:
        """Build a dependency tree for visualization."""
        skills = self.db.fetch_all("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE plan_id = ? ORDER BY order_index", (plan_id,))
        tree = {"nodes": [], "edges": []}
        for skill in skills:
            prereqs = json.loads(skill.get("prerequisites", "[]"))
            progress = (skill["current_level"] / skill["target_level"] * 100) if skill["target_level"] > 0 else 100
            tree["nodes"].append({
                "id": skill["id"],
                "name": skill["name"],
                "category": skill["category"],
                "current_level": skill["current_level"],
                "target_level": skill["target_level"],
                "progress": round(progress, 1),
            })
            for prereq_id in prereqs:
                tree["edges"].append({"from": prereq_id, "to": skill["id"]})
        return tree


# =============================================================================
# collaboration.py - Real-Time Collaboration
# =============================================================================

class CollaborationService:
    """Real-time collaboration service with room management and messaging."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db
        self._subscribers: Dict[str, List[callable]] = defaultdict(list)
        self._online_users: Dict[str, set] = defaultdict(set)

    def create_room(self, creator_id: str, name: str, room_type: str = "quest",
                    reference_id: str = None, max_participants: int = 10) -> Dict:
        room_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO collaboration_rooms (id, name, room_type, reference_id, creator_id, max_participants, created_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (room_id, name, room_type, reference_id, creator_id, max_participants, now),
        )
        self.join_room(room_id, creator_id, role="admin")
        return self.get_room(room_id)

    def get_room(self, room_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        room = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM collaboration_rooms WHERE id = ?", (room_id,))
        if room:
            room["participants"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                """SELECT rp.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM room_participants rp
                   JOIN users u ON rp.user_id = u.id WHERE rp.room_id = ?""",
                (room_id,),
            )
            room["online_users"] = list(self._online_users.get(room_id, set()))
        return room

    def list_rooms(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        rooms = self.db.fetch_all(
            """SELECT cr.* FROM collaboration_rooms cr
               JOIN room_participants rp ON cr.id = rp.room_id
               WHERE rp.user_id = ? AND cr.is_active = 1
               ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC""",
            (user_id,),
        )
        for room in rooms:
            room["participants"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                """SELECT rp.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM room_participants rp
                   JOIN users u ON rp.user_id = u.id WHERE rp.room_id = ?""",
                (room["id"],),
            )
            room["online_users"] = list(self._online_users.get(room["id"], set()))
        return rooms

    def join_room(self, room_id: str, user_id: str, role: str = "member") -> bool:
        room = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT max_participants FROM collaboration_rooms WHERE id = ?", (room_id,))
        if not room:
            return False
        current_count = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ?", (room_id,)
        )
        if current_count and current_count["cnt"] >= room["max_participants"]:
            return False
        existing = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT room_id FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id = ?", (room_id, user_id)
        )
        if existing:
            return True
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (room_id, user_id, role, now),
        )
        self._notify_room(room_id, {"type": "user_joined", "user_id": user_id})
        return True

    def leave_room(self, room_id: str, user_id: str) -> bool:
        self.db.execute(
            "DELETE FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id = ?", (room_id, user_id)
        )
        self._online_users[room_id].discard(user_id)
        self._notify_room(room_id, {"type": "user_left", "user_id": user_id})
        return True

    def send_message(self, room_id: str, user_id: str, content: str,
                     message_type: str = "text", metadata: Dict = None) -> Dict:
        msg_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO messages (id, room_id, user_id, content, message_type, metadata, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (msg_id, room_id, user_id, content, message_type, json.dumps(metadata or {}), now),
        )
        message = {"id": msg_id, "room_id": room_id, "user_id": user_id,
                   "content": content, "message_type": message_type,
                   "metadata": metadata or {}, "created_at": now}
        self._notify_room(room_id, {"type": "new_message", "message": message})
        return message

    def get_messages(self, room_id: str, limit: int = 50, before: str = None) -> List[Dict]:
        query = """SELECT m.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM messages m
                   JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.room_id = ?"""
        params = [room_id]
        if before:
            query += " AND m.created_at < ?"
            params.append(before)
        query += " ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT ?"
        params.append(limit)
        messages = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))
        for msg in messages:
            msg["metadata"] = json.loads(msg.get("metadata", "{}"))
        return list(reversed(messages))

    def set_user_online(self, room_id: str, user_id: str):
        self._online_users[room_id].add(user_id)
        self._notify_room(room_id, {"type": "user_online", "user_id": user_id})

    def set_user_offline(self, room_id: str, user_id: str):
        self._online_users[room_id].discard(user_id)
        self._notify_room(room_id, {"type": "user_offline", "user_id": user_id})

    def subscribe(self, room_id: str, callback: callable):
        self._subscribers[room_id].append(callback)

    def unsubscribe(self, room_id: str, callback: callable):
        if callback in self._subscribers[room_id]:
            self._subscribers[room_id].remove(callback)

    def _notify_room(self, room_id: str, event: Dict):
        for callback in self._subscribers.get(room_id, []):
            try:
                callback(event)
            except Exception:
                pass


# =============================================================================
# sync_service.py - Data Synchronization
# =============================================================================

class SyncService:
    """Service for synchronizing data across devices and users."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    def get_changes_since(self, timestamp: str, entity_type: str = None,
                          user_id: str = None) -> List[Dict]:
        query = "SELECT * FROM sync_events WHERE timestamp > ?"
        params = [timestamp]
        if entity_type:
            query += " AND entity_type = ?"
            params.append(entity_type)
        if user_id:
            query += " AND user_id = ?"
            params.append(user_id)
        query += " ORDER BY timestamp ASC"
        events = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))
        for event in events:
            event["data"] = json.loads(event.get("data", "{}"))
        return events

    def get_entity_history(self, entity_type: str, entity_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        events = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT * FROM sync_events WHERE entity_type = ? AND entity_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp ASC",
            (entity_type, entity_id),
        )
        for event in events:
            event["data"] = json.loads(event.get("data", "{}"))
        return events

    def resolve_conflict(self, event_a: Dict, event_b: Dict) -> Dict:
        """Last-write-wins conflict resolution strategy."""
        if event_a["timestamp"] >= event_b["timestamp"]:
            return event_a
        return event_b


# =============================================================================
# api.py - API Layer (Request/Response handling)
# =============================================================================

class APIResponse:
    """Standard API response wrapper."""

    @staticmethod
    def success(data: Any = None, message: str = "Success") -> Dict:
        return {"status": "success", "message": message, "data": data}

    @staticmethod
    def error(message: str, code: int = 400) -> Dict:
        return {"status": "error", "message": message, "code": code}


class QuestHubAPI:
    """REST API handler for QuestHub application."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database = None):
        self.db = db or Database()
        self.auth = AuthService(self.db)
        self.quests = QuestService(self.db)
        self.skills = SkillPlanService(self.db)
        self.collaboration = CollaborationService(self.db)
        self.sync = SyncService(self.db)

    def handle_request(self, method: str, path: str, body: Dict = None,
                       token: str = None) -> Dict:
        """Route and handle API requests."""
        body = body or {}

        # Public routes
        if path == "/api/auth/register" and method == "POST":
            return self._register(body)
        if path == "/api/auth/login" and method == "POST":
            return self._login(body)

        # Authenticated routes
        user_id = self.auth.authenticate(token) if token else None
        if not user_id:
            return APIResponse.error("Authentication required", 401)

        # Quest routes
        if path == "/api/quests" and method == "GET":
            return self._list_quests(user_id, body)
        if path == "/api/quests" and method == "POST":
            return self._create_quest(user_id, body)
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "GET":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[-1]
            return self._get_quest(quest_id)
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "PUT":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[-1]
            return self._update_quest(user_id, quest_id, body)
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "DELETE":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[-1]
            return self._delete_quest(user_id, quest_id)

        # Skill plan routes
        if path == "/api/skills/plans" and method == "GET":
            return self._list_plans(user_id)
        if path == "/api/skills/plans" and method == "POST":
            return self._create_plan(user_id, body)
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/plans/") and method == "GET":
            plan_id = path.split("/")[-1]
            return self._get_plan(plan_id)
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/plans/") and method == "PUT":
            plan_id = path.split("/")[-1]
            return self._update_plan(plan_id, body)

        # Skill routes
        if path == "/api/skills" and method == "POST":
            return self._add_skill(body)
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/") and path.endswith("/levelup") and method == "POST":
            skill_id = path.split("/")[-2]
            return self._levelup_skill(skill_id)

        # Collaboration routes
        if path == "/api/rooms" and method == "GET":
            return self._list_rooms(user_id)
        if path == "/api/rooms" and method == "POST":
            return self._create_room(user_id, body)
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/join") and method == "POST":
            room_id = path.split("/")[-2]
            return self._join_room(user_id, room_id)
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/messages") and method == "GET":
            room_id = path.split("/")[-2]
            return self._get_messages(room_id)
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/messages") and method == "POST":
            room_id = path.split("/")[-2]
            return self._send_message(user_id, room_id, body)

        # Sync routes
        if path == "/api/sync" and method == "GET":
            return self._get_sync_changes(user_id, body)

        # User profile
        if path == "/api/profile" and method == "GET":
            return self._get_profile(user_id)

        return APIResponse.error("Not found", 404)

    def _register(self, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        try:
            result = self.auth.register(
                body.get("username", ""), body.get("email", ""),
                body.get("password", ""), body.get("display_name"),
            )
            return APIResponse.success(result, "Registration successful")
        except AuthError as e:
            return APIResponse.error(str(e))

    def _login(self, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        try:
            result = self.auth.login(body.get("username", ""), body.get("password", ""))
            return APIResponse.success(result, "Login successful")
        except AuthError as e:
            return APIResponse.error(str(e), 401)

    def _list_quests(self, user_id: str, params: Dict) -> Dict:
        quests = self.quests.list_quests(user_id, params.get("status"), params.get("quest_type"))
        return APIResponse.success(quests)

    def _create_quest(self, user_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        quest = self.quests.create_quest(
            creator_id=user_id, title=body.get("title", ""),
            description=body.get("description", ""),
            quest_type=body.get("quest_type", "main"),
            difficulty=body.get("difficulty", "normal"),
            experience_reward=body.get("experience_reward", 100),
            deadline=body.get("deadline"),
            parent_quest_id=body.get("parent_quest_id"),
        )
        return APIResponse.success(quest, "Quest created")

    def _get_quest(self, quest_id: str) -> Dict:
        quest = self.quests.get_quest(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return APIResponse.error("Quest not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(quest)

    def _update_quest(self, user_id: str, quest_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        quest = self.quests.update_quest(quest_id, user_id, **body)
        if not quest:
            return APIResponse.error("Quest not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(quest, "Quest updated")

    def _delete_quest(self, user_id: str, quest_id: str) -> Dict:
        if self.quests.delete_quest(quest_id, user_id):
            return APIResponse.success(None, "Quest deleted")
        return APIResponse.error("Quest not found or unauthorized", 404)

    def _list_plans(self, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        plans = self.skills.list_plans(user_id)
        return APIResponse.success(plans)

    def _create_plan(self, user_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        plan = self.skills.create_plan(
            user_id=user_id, name=body.get("name", ""),
            description=body.get("description", ""),
            character_class=body.get("character_class"),
            target_level=body.get("target_level", 1),
        )
        return APIResponse.success(plan, "Skill plan created")

    def _get_plan(self, plan_id: str) -> Dict:
        plan = self.skills.get_plan(plan_id)
        if not plan:
            return APIResponse.error("Plan not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(plan)

    def _update_plan(self, plan_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        plan = self.skills.update_plan(plan_id, **body)
        if not plan:
            return APIResponse.error("Plan not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(plan, "Plan updated")

    def _add_skill(self, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        skill = self.skills.add_skill(
            plan_id=body.get("plan_id", ""), name=body.get("name", ""),
            description=body.get("description", ""),
            category=body.get("category", "general"),
            target_level=body.get("target_level", 1),
            prerequisites=body.get("prerequisites"),
            order_index=body.get("order_index", 0),
        )
        return APIResponse.success(skill, "Skill added")

    def _levelup_skill(self, skill_id: str) -> Dict:
        skill = self.skills.level_up_skill(skill_id)
        if not skill:
            return APIResponse.error("Skill not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(skill, "Skill leveled up")

    def _list_rooms(self, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        rooms = self.collaboration.list_rooms(user_id)
        return APIResponse.success(rooms)

    def _create_room(self, user_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        room = self.collaboration.create_room(
            creator_id=user_id, name=body.get("name", ""),
            room_type=body.get("room_type", "quest"),
            reference_id=body.get("reference_id"),
            max_participants=body.get("max_participants", 10),
        )
        return APIResponse.success(room, "Room created")

    def _join_room(self, user_id: str, room_id: str) -> Dict:
        if self.collaboration.join_room(room_id, user_id):
            return APIResponse.success(None, "Joined room")
        return APIResponse.error("Cannot join room", 400)

    def _get_messages(self, room_id: str) -> Dict:
        messages = self.collaboration.get_messages(room_id)
        return APIResponse.success(messages)

    def _send_message(self, user_id: str, room_id: str, body: Dict) -> Dict:
        message = self.collaboration.send_message(
            room_id=room_id, user_id=user_id,
            content=body.get("content", ""),
            message_type=body.get("message_type", "text"),
            metadata=body.get("metadata"),
        )
        return APIResponse.success(message, "Message sent")

    def _get_sync_changes(self, user_id: str, params: Dict) -> Dict:
        since = params.get("since", "2000-01-01T00:00:00")
        changes = self.sync.get_changes_since(since, user_id=user_id)
        return APIResponse.success(changes)

    def _get_profile(self, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        profile = self.auth.get_user_profile(user_id)
        if not profile:
            return APIResponse.error("User not found", 404)
        return APIResponse.success(profile)

FRONTEND_HTML = """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">

        .sidebar .nav-item { padding: 10px 16px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s; }
        .sidebar .nav-item:hover, .sidebar .nav-item.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .main { padding: 24px; overflow-y: auto; }

        .card h3 { color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .btn { padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: 0.2s; }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-dark); }
        .btn-success { background: var(--success); color: white; }
        .btn-danger { background: var(--danger); color: white; }
        input, textarea, select { width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .quest-list .quest-item { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .quest-item .status { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 12px; }
        .quest-item .status.active { background: var(--success); }
        .quest-item .status.completed { background: var(--text-muted); }
        .skill-tree { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
        .skill-node { text-align: center; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid var(--border); }
        .skill-node .progress-bar { height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; margin-top: 8px; }
        .skill-node .progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--secondary); border-radius: 2px; }
        .chat-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 400px; }
        .chat-messages { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 12px; }
        .chat-input { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .chat-input input { flex: 1; margin: 0; }
        .message { margin-bottom: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--bg-input); }
        .message .author { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .badge-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .badge-success { background: var(--success); color: white; }
        .tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .tab { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0; cursor: pointer; background: var(--bg-input); }
        .tab.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
        .grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .app { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .sidebar { display: none; } .grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="app">
        <header class="header">
            <h1>⚔ QuestHub</h1>
            <div class="user-info" id="user-info">Not logged in</div>
        </header>
        <nav class="sidebar">
            <div class="nav-item active" onclick="showSection('quests')">⚔ Quests</div>
            <div class="nav-item" onclick="showSection('skills')">★ Skill Plans</div>
            <div class="nav-item" onclick="showSection('collab')">♡ Collaboration</div>
            <div class="nav-item" onclick="showSection('profile')">☺ Profile</div>
        </nav>
        <main class="main" id="main-content">
            <div id="section-quests">
                <div class="card">
                    <h3>My Quests</h3>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showQuestForm()">+ New Quest</button>
                    <div class="quest-list" id="quest-list"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>
    </div>
    <script>
        const API_BASE = '/api';
        let authToken = null;
        let currentUser = null;

        async function apiCall(method, path, body = null) {
            const opts = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } };
            if (authToken) opts.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + authToken;
            if (body) opts.body = JSON.stringify(body);
            const res = await fetch(API_BASE + path, opts);
            return res.json();
        }

        function showSection(name) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');
        }

        async function loadQuests() {
            const res = await apiCall('GET', '/quests');
            if (res.status === 'success') {
                const list = document.getElementById('quest-list');
                list.innerHTML = res.data.map(q => `
                    <div class="quest-item">
                        <div class="status ${q.status}"></div>
                        <div><strong>${q.title}</strong><br><small>${q.quest_type} - ${q.difficulty}</small></div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            }
        }

        function showQuestForm() {
            const main = document.getElementById('main-content');
            main.innerHTML = `<div class="card"><h3>Create Quest</h3>
                <input id="q-title" placeholder="Quest Title">
                <textarea id="q-desc" placeholder="Description"></textarea>
                <select id="q-type"><option>main</option><option>side</option><option>daily</option><option>group</option></select>
                <select id="q-diff"><option>easy</option><option>normal</option><option>hard</option><option>legendary</option></select>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="createQuest()">Create</button></div>`;
        }

        async function createQuest() {
            await apiCall('POST', '/quests', {
                title: document.getElementById('q-title').value,
                description: document.getElementById('q-desc').value,
                quest_type: document.getElementById('q-type').value,
                difficulty: document.getElementById('q-diff').value,
            });
            loadQuests();
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>"""


# =============================================================================
# server.py - HTTP Server
# =============================================================================

from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
import io


class QuestHubRequestHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    """HTTP request handler for QuestHub."""

    api: QuestHubAPI = None

    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        pass  # Suppress default logging

    def _get_token(self) -> Optional[str]:
        auth_header = self.headers.get("Authorization", "")
        if auth_header.startswith("Bearer "):
            return auth_header[7:]
        return None

    def _read_body(self) -> Dict:
        content_length = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0))
        if content_length > 0:
            body = self.rfile.read(content_length)
            return json.loads(body.decode("utf-8"))
        return {}

    def _send_response(self, data: Dict, status_code: int = 200):
        self.send_response(status_code)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Content-Type, Authorization")
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS")
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps(data).encode("utf-8"))

    def _send_html(self, html: str):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html")
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(html.encode("utf-8"))

    def do_OPTIONS(self):
        self._send_response({})

    def do_GET(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        if parsed.path == "/" or parsed.path == "/index.html":
            self._send_html(FRONTEND_HTML)
            return
        params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
        flat_params = {k: v[0] for k, v in params.items()}
        response = self.api.handle_request("GET", parsed.path, flat_params, self._get_token())
        code = response.get("code", 200) if response.get("status") == "error" else 200
        self._send_response(response, code)

    def do_POST(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        body = self._read_body()
        response = self.api.handle_request("POST", parsed.path, body, self._get_token())
        code = response.get("code", 200) if response.get("status") == "error" else 200
        self._send_response(response, code)

    def do_PUT(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        body = self._read_body()
        response = self.api.handle_request("PUT", parsed.path, body, self._get_token())
        code = response.get("code", 200) if response.get("status") == "error" else 200
        self._send_response(response, code)

    def do_DELETE(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        response = self.api.handle_request("DELETE", parsed.path, {}, self._get_token())
        code = response.get("code", 200) if response.get("status") == "error" else 200
        self._send_response(response, code)


def create_server(host: str = "0.0.0.0", port: int = 8080, db_path: str = ":memory:") -> HTTPServer:
    """Create and configure the QuestHub HTTP server."""
    db = Database(db_path)
    api = QuestHubAPI(db)
    QuestHubRequestHandler.api = api
    server = HTTPServer((host, port), QuestHubRequestHandler)
    return server


# =============================================================================
# websocket.py - WebSocket-like Real-Time Communication
# =============================================================================

class RealtimeHub:
    """Event-driven real-time communication hub (polling-based fallback)."""

    def __init__(self, collaboration: CollaborationService):
        self.collaboration = collaboration
        self._event_queues: Dict[str, List[Dict]] = defaultdict(list)
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def connect(self, user_id: str, room_id: str):
        self.collaboration.set_user_online(room_id, user_id)
        self.collaboration.subscribe(room_id, lambda event: self._enqueue(user_id, event))

    def disconnect(self, user_id: str, room_id: str):
        self.collaboration.set_user_offline(room_id, user_id)

    def poll_events(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        with self._lock:
            events = self._event_queues.pop(user_id, [])
        return events

    def broadcast(self, room_id: str, event: Dict):
        room = self.collaboration.get_room(room_id)
        if room:
            for participant in room.get("participants", []):
                self._enqueue(participant["user_id"], event)

    def _enqueue(self, user_id: str, event: Dict):
        with self._lock:
            self._event_queues[user_id].append(event)


# =============================================================================
# main entry point
# =============================================================================

def main():
    """Run the QuestHub server."""
    import sys

    port = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 8080
    db_path = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else "questhub.db"

    print(f"╔══════════════════════════════════════╗")
    print(f"║       QuestHub Server v1.0.0         ║")
    print(f"║  Quest Management & Collaboration    ║")
    print(f"╠══════════════════════════════════════╣")
    print(f"║  Server: http://localhost:{port:<10} ║")
    print(f"║  Database: {db_path:<24} ║")
    print(f"╚══════════════════════════════════════╝")

    server = create_server("0.0.0.0", port, db_path)
    try:
        server.serve_forever()
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\nShutting down QuestHub server...")
        server.shutdown()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
